label: Terrain threshold
description: A terrain layer applied when a noise value falls within the specified min-max range.

terrain.label: Terrain
terrain.description: TerrainDef placed when the sampled noise value is within this threshold range.

min.label: Min
min.description: Minimum noise value (inclusive) at which this terrain is applied.

max.label: Max
max.description: Maximum noise value (exclusive) at which this terrain is applied.
